Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Telariel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Telariel, the Spider, is a Judge who coordinates communications for all the Abidan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Telariel is known as the Spider and is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Telariel is currently coordinating Abidan efforts on all fronts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ozmanthus was the successor to Telariel in the Third Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Telariel is the Spider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Telariel handles communication through the Way.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Telariel is the Spider and has a spire marked with eight stylized legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Telariel the Spider is one of the seven Judges and is described as being very busy.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Telariel is one of the Judges.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
